6 key takeaways from: Google Cloud Digital Leader Study Guide: Everything You Need

1. Certification: Google Cloud Digital Leader
2. Exam Code: CDL
3. Vendor: Google Cloud
4. Domain 1: Digital Transformation with Google Cloud (~30%)
5. Domain 2: Innovating with Data and Google Cloud (~35%)
6. Domain 3: Infrastructure and Application Modernization (~35%)

Which one surprised you the most? Comment below!

3. Vendor: Google Cloud
4. Domain 1: Digital Transformation with Google Cloud (~30%)
5. Domain 2: Innovating with Data and Google Cloud (~35%)
6. Domain 3: Infrastructure and Application Modernization (~35%)
